title: taraxacum galbanum
intro: Taraxacum galbanum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum galbanum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health problems.
